text: All regulatory approvals received. Scheme expected to become effective on 1 April 2026.
Bridgepoint confirms that it does not intend to make an offer for Spire Healthcare.
New addition - strategic review & formal sale process, after going into administration.
Board rejects StoneX's indicative offer of 95p - "significantly undervalues" company
Scheme document published - vote scheduled for 15 April 2026
